  
<script async src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-6878992848042528"
     crossorigin="anonymous"></script>  

<h2> Aude Ines Mbonda Tiekwe</h2>  
<p style="text-align: justify"><img align="right" src='/_assets/images/profile.png' class='oval-image' alt='Profile Picture' style='align-right; margin-left: 25px; margin-bottom: 10px;'><br>
    Ph.D. Candidate in Mathematics  
    <a href='https://fsu.edu' target='_blank' style='text-decoration:none'>Florida State University</a><br>
    <br>
    <span style='font-size: 1.1em; font-weight: bold; margin-top: 50px; margin-bottom: 50px;'>Contact</span>  
    Email: <a href="mailto:ines@aims.ac.za" style="text-decoration:none"> ines@aims.ac.za</a>  
    Office: <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/p25RvKR6jiecRYsG9" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none"> James J. Love Building: Room 331A</a>  
    Office Hours: <br>
    Monday and Wednesday 12:00 pm -1:00 pm <br>
    Tuesday 11:30 am - 12:30 pm
</p>  

<br>

---  

<p style="text-align: justify">    
    I am  a PostDoctoral Researcher at the African Institute for Mathematical Sciences.
#I am actively involved in research in the area of Data Science, Machine Learning, and Financial Mathematics under the supervision of #professor <a href="https://www.math.fsu.edu/DepartmentNews/Articles/Fac_Zhu.math" style="text-decoration:none" target="_blank"> #Lingjiong Zhu</a>.<br>
    <br>
     My academic journey has been both diverse and enriching, spanning multiple institutions. I obtained a master’s degree in Mathematics Sciences from the African Institute for Mathematical sciences. Prior to that, I completed my undergraduate degree in Applied Mathematics at the University of Douala, Cameroon, followed by a master degree in Financial managemnent from Amity University, India.
</p>
